document_summary: PR Newswire report on ZEISS Vision winning the Silver Award in the Marketing Case Category of the 13th Tiger Roar Awards. Demonstrates the caliber of works judged at the awards. Key statistics: 650+ public jury, 90+ final judging panel, 10+ executive members, 4,000+ case works from 800+ companies. Liu is not mentioned; this shows the quality of companies and works evaluated in the judging process he oversaw.

snippets.text: Guangzhou Aug. 23, 2022 / PR Newswire / -- The Award Ceremony of \(13^{\text{th}}\) Tiger Roar Award was held in Beijing on Aug. 19, 2022. Selected project of ZEISS Vision - ZEISS \(\times iG\) Esports Club: To Empower the New Future of Esports Optics stood out from over 4,000 case works submitted by brand owners, agencies, media advertising, technology companies, and other altogether more than 800 participating companies to win the Silver Award in the Marketing Case Category.
snippets.subject: ZEISS Vision
snippets.reasoning: Shows the caliber of winning companies (ZEISS, a global leader) and scale (4,000+ works, 800+ companies) in the awards Liu judged as Deputy Director.

snippets.text: As the most professionally influential comprehensive award in the digital field of Chinese brand marketing, this session's Tiger Roar Award selected out the winners upon online review by \(650+\) public jury, panel discussion and final review by \(90+\) final judging panel, and reexamination by \(10+\) executive members. After rounds of selection, ZEISS Vision won high recognition within and outside the industry based on its excellent innovative marketing case with new attempts, new methods, new products and new thoughts.
snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards
snippets.reasoning: Critical snippet: identifies Tiger Roar Award as 'the most professionally influential comprehensive award' and details the multi-tier judging process (650+ public jury, 90+ final panel, 10+ executives).

snippets.text: ZEISS is a global leading science and technology enterprise in optics and photoelectricity industry. In the last fiscal year, the gross revenue of the four business departments of ZEISS Group as semiconductor manufacturing technology, industrial quality and research, medical technology, and optical consumer goods market has exceeded EUR seven billion.
snippets.subject: ZEISS
snippets.reasoning: Establishes ZEISS as a global leader with EUR 7B+ revenue, demonstrating the caliber of companies submitting to the awards Liu judged.

snippets.text: ZEISS has over 35,000 employees throughout the world, about 60 sales and service companies, 30 manufacturing bases and 27 research and development bases in nearly 50 countries.
snippets.subject: ZEISS
snippets.reasoning: Further establishes ZEISS as a major global enterprise (35,000+ employees, operations in 50 countries) whose work was judged at the Tiger Roar Awards.

snippets.text: ## ZEISS Vision Won the Silver Award in the Marketing Case Category of the \(13^{\text{th}}\text{Tiger Roar Awards}\)
snippets.subject: ZEISS Vision
snippets.reasoning: Headline from PR Newswire confirming ZEISS Vision's Silver Award at the 13th Tiger Roar Awards, published on a major global news wire.

snippets.text: Mr. Zander Hattingh, Vice President of Global Marketing of ZEISS Vision, thought highly of the project: "This innovative project, initiated by the Chinese team, takes the Chinese market as its position, and customizes for the Chinese target audiences. Our project has remarkable impact on different social medial channels, and has contributed to a wide range of public cognition and participation."
snippets.subject: Zander Hattingh
snippets.reasoning: VP of Global Marketing at ZEISS Vision praises the marketing project, evidence of industry impact.
